text: Machine learning is a type of artificial intelligence where computers learn from data. One common approach is supervised learning. In this method, the computer is given training data, which includes input examples along with their correct answers. Using this data, the computer builds a model—a kind of mathematical rule or pattern. Once the model is ready, it can make predictions on new, unseen data. For example, a model trained on pictures of cats and dogs can predict whether a new photo shows a cat or a dog. The quality of a model is measured by its accuracy, or how often its predictions are correct.
